title: Fit test - Successfully completing the Fit Test
scenario: Fit Test completes successfully showing "Good" fit for both earbuds on Voyager Free 60/60+/20
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app with a supported Poly device (Voyager Free 60/60+/20) connected and correctly positioned in the ears.
2. Go to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Fit Test.
3. Start and successfully complete the fit test.
expected: After step 3: "This is a good fit!" message appears, both earbuds show "Good" tag with icon, and "Done" button is displayed. After step 4: User returns to Device Home Screen (or Onboarding if triggered during onboarding).
